reason: Verify dependency direction (modbridge must NOT import downloader; app.go owns Wails event emission) and that new helpers reside in the correct package per the bridge-package contract.
Check new functions against forbidden patterns: no type aliases, no re-export files, no parallel converter paths, canonical-type naming (ModVersion, not aliases).
Confirm R1/R3 do not bump cacheVersion and correctly use existing database.GetVersionModIDs/SetVersionModIDs rather than introducing a new persistence layer.
Cross-layer verification: modbridge→database (R1 read), modbridge→minecraft+global (R2 scan), app.go→frontend (R3 event channel) — ensure each layer interaction is audited.
